stat.title: Reached on Error Merchants
stat.subtitle: Plate appearances where the batter reached on a fielding error.

notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Tovar reached on error · Bot 6
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Tovar reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Curtis Mead.

notableEvents.detail: Royce Lewis reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Parker Messick. Josh Bell scores. Royce Lewis to 2nd. Royce Lewis advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Travis Bazzana.
